synthesis.concurrency_position: Stage1 contract allows local filesystem append semantics and requires implementation fixtures for multi-writer stress; network filesystems are out-of-scope unless explicitly proven.
synthesis.core_design: Canonical path guard + structured JSON record serialization + single-record append using OS append semantics + optional fsync policy + line readback/tail validation + failure event emission.
synthesis.record_format: One JSON object per line, UTF-8, no raw newline outside JSON string escaping, bounded bytes, required schema_version/event_id/timestamp/source/event_type/payload/hash fields.
synthesis.security_position: Logs are security artifacts; reject unstructured strings, raw bytes, CR/LF record delimiters outside JSON serialization, path traversal, symlink targets/ancestors, and unsafe suffixes.
synthesis.why_not_atomic_json_writer: Append-only JSONL/log/ledger streams require preserving prior records and adding exactly one bounded record; replace-style atomic JSON document writing is wrong for append streams.
